params.name: Ancient Snail Fossil
params.description: Tens of millions of years ago, snails were not the mollusks they are today but vertebrates with a skeleton. This weathered ancient fossil is the best evidence of this theory!
params.ss1:
Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +2%
Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail DEF +4
Quarry LVL: 50/50
